text.tspan: Average per capita alcohol consumption in 15-19 year olds, 2010
Average per capita consumption of alcohol, measured in litres of pure alcohol per year for those aged 15-19
years old. This is measured across both sexes.
Data source: World Health Organization - Global Health Observatory (2024)
